citations.narrative:
In the early morning of April 23, 2026, eight of the nine wolf-dog hybrids escaped their outdoor, primary enclosure by
digging a hole under a front section of the enclosure’s chain link fencing. Seven of the wolf-dog hybrids remained on the
property grounds, and the animal staff safely secured them later in the day. One male, wolf-dog hybrid, Fenrir
(#941000029748509) escaped the facility and was found struck by a vehicle and deceased on the nearby highway.
Failure to securely contain dogs in an adequately constructed and maintained enclosure may lead to animal escape and
possible distress, injury or death. Primary enclosures must be constructed and maintained so that they contain the dogs
securely. Prior to inspection, the facility had taken corrective actions to prevent these animals from escaping this
enclosure.
Correct from this day, 05/29/2026, forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.6(a)(2)(iii)  Critical
   
Primary enclosures. 
In the early morning of April 23, 2026, eight of the nine wolf-dog hybrids escaped their outdoor, primary enclosure by 
digging a hole under a front section of the enclosure’s chain link fencing. Seven of the wolf-dog hybrids remained on the 
property grounds, and the animal staff safely secured them later in the day. One male, wolf-dog hybrid, Fenrir 
(#941000029748509) escaped the facility and was found struck by a vehicle and deceased on the nearby highway. 
Failure to securely contain dogs in an adequately constructed and maintained enclosure may lead to animal escape and 
possible distress, injury or death. Primary enclosures must be constructed and maintained so that they contain the dogs 
securely. Prior to inspection, the facility had taken corrective actions to prevent these animals from escaping this 
enclosure. 
 
Correct from this day, 05/29/2026, forward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
